# unifi_wan_sla (Data Source)

Look up an existing WAN SLA monitor by ID or name. Read-only.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a WAN SLA monitor by name
data "unifi_wan_sla" "primary" {
  name = "Primary WAN"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the WAN SLA. Specify either id or name.
- `name` (String) The name of the WAN SLA. Specify either id or name.

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `interface` (String)
- `target` (String)
- `threshold_latency` (Number)
- `threshold_packet_loss` (Number)
